change: awq_gemv_bf16_kernel inner row-loop: batch UNROLL=8 independent (act,qweight) loads before dequant/FMA -> more in-flight memory ops. Persisted in patch 006.
root_cause: GEMV was memory-LATENCY-bound (profiled 85.8% GPU util, 78% of decode, ~5x under weight-read roofline). Not dispatch (cuda-graph no help), not DeltaNet (0.6%), not occupancy (grid-split only helped most-starved shape).

in131072.note: smaller mult at long ctx (context-dep attention dilutes GEMV gain)

scope: benefits every dense/hybrid AWQ model (qwen35, qwen36-27b, qwen3vl-32b, devstral, gemma4-31b)
persisted: patches/006 regenerated, round-trip verified (git apply to empty tree reproduces optimized .cu/.hip byte-identical)
residual_optional: uint4 (128-bit) loads + cheaper packed dequant could push past current ~50-80% roofline
pending: full re-sweep of dense/hybrid AWQ decode tables (README numbers are pre-fix ~1.7x low; only qwen36-27b @128/@131K re-measured)
